name: sap-architecture
description: Generate, validate, score, and autofix SAP / BTP / on-prem architecture diagrams as draw.io (.drawio) files following the official SAP BTP Solution Diagram Guidelines (Fiori Horizon palette, area/layer conventions, grey-circle service icons, connector semantics, L0-L2 levels). Bundles 100 SAP BTP service icons, 448 indexed SAP draw.io starter-kit assets, and 63 SAP reference templates.
